changes.summary: Replaced legacy mongosh raw Mongo inserts with NestJS application-context script: creates users via UserService.createOrUpdateUser (authProvider: fake, fake_lead_* authIds), ensures fake superadmin, and assigns leads via createAssignLeadUseCase.execute (wallet createOrGetWallet + membership side effects).

notes: New script path scripts/add-test-leads.mjs (repo root). Legacy add-test-leads.mjs at repo root unchanged (outside write_set). Requires api deps (pnpm install) and MongoDB; bootstraps MeriterModule like migrate-collaborative-documents.ts.
